name: PathologieKohorte
title: Pathologie-Kohorte
description: SQL-on-FHIR ViewDefinition: Pathologie-Befunde mit IHC-Status. Spalten: patientId, reportId, datum, morphology (ICD-O-3), grading, er, pr, her2, ki67. ER/PR/HER2/Ki-67 werden aus der conclusion-Freitext und referenzierten Observations extrahiert.

where.path: meta.profile contains 'http://fhir.bih-charite.de/kds-senologie/StructureDefinition/senologie-pathologie-befund' or meta.profile contains 'https://www.medizininformatik-initiative.de/fhir/ext/modul-patho/StructureDefinition/mii-pr-patho-report' or category.coding.where(code='SP' or code='PAT').exists() or code.coding.where(code='60568-3').exists()

column.path: iif(conclusion.matches('.*ER\+.*') or conclusion.matches('.*ER positiv.*'), 'positive', iif(conclusion.matches('.*ER-.*') or conclusion.matches('.*ER negativ.*'), 'negative', {}))
column.name: er

column.path: iif(conclusion.matches('.*PR\+.*') or conclusion.matches('.*PR positiv.*'), 'positive', iif(conclusion.matches('.*PR-.*') or conclusion.matches('.*PR negativ.*'), 'negative', {}))
column.name: pr

column.path: iif(conclusion.matches('.*HER2\+.*') or conclusion.contains('HER2 Score 3') or conclusion.matches('.*HER2 positiv.*'), 'positive', iif(conclusion.matches('.*HER2-.*') or conclusion.contains('HER2 Score 0') or conclusion.contains('HER2 Score 1') or conclusion.matches('.*HER2 negativ.*'), 'negative', {}))
column.name: her2
